editor.name: Hobunji Hollow NPC Database Editor
editor.contentPolicy: Use design-doc facts only. Unknowns use specific suggestion placeholders.
editor.avatarImport: Import Avatar JSON expects export JSON from the NPC portrait/avatar editor tool.

npcs.name: Garanki Gabu
npcs.bio: Researcher’s Tent resident. Age noted as <carter’s age>.

npcs.name: Gorobi Ginju
npcs.bio: Middle aged man; friendly, but <unspecified complication>.

npcs.name: Gikali Ginju
npcs.bio: Middle aged woman; kind, but anxious.

npcs.name: Aliri Ginju
npcs.bio: Romanceable; young woman; dutiful.

npcs.name: Gantami Ginju
npcs.bio: Little boy; rascal.

npcs.name: Leaf
npcs.bio: Old Engh Sho man; quiet, grumpy but restrained.

npcs.name: Pahu
npcs.bio: Old Kenkari man; silly, friendly, loves festivals and dragging Leaf out of his shell.

npcs.name: Furunji Funji
npcs.bio: Middle aged shopkeep; friendly but overworked; always looks tired.
npcs.shopHours: <suggestion: general store hours should be decided here>

npcs.name: Foroji Funji
npcs.bio: Romanceable son; bard; only living family member of Furunji but does not want to inherit.

npcs.name: Kzubug
npcs.bio: Late middle aged Mashtzarr smith; very kind, but very protective of Sloomi.

npcs.name: Sloomi
npcs.bio: Romanceable adopted daughter and apprentice smith; nice but quiet; aggressive when people she cares about are hurt physically or emotionally.

npcs.name: Hreesh
npcs.bio: Amicable but blunt Mashtzarr innkeeper.

npcs.name: Jubmir
npcs.bio: Romanceable when in town.

npcs.name: Father Hunundi Hodu
npcs.bio: Late middle aged priest; gets player fixed up and suggests settling in abandoned farmstead after player does not remember home.

npcs.name: Namu’i u Hakaru
npcs.bio: Romanceable temple resident.

npcs.name: Taku’a ao Hakaru
npcs.bio: Romanceable temple resident.

npcs.name: Kaboku Kunji
npcs.bio: Old man at Potion Shop.

npcs.name: Kinami Kunji
npcs.bio: Potion Shop resident. Design doc provides hostile/prejudiced dialogue lines.

npcs.name: Dzibim Khibu
npcs.bio: Carpenter. Design doc gives house-building family history dialogue.

npcs.name: Dzahiri Khibu
npcs.bio: Carpenter’s household. Connected to Dzibim and the old Manji roofing side by the provided Dzibim line.

npcs.name: Nashka Khibu
npcs.bio: Named under Carpenter’s; no further details provided.

npcs.name: Teacup Unumanuk
npcs.bio: Unumanuk Clan eldress.

npcs.name: Binding Hatayap
npcs.bio: Single mother whose husband died fighting off the wyrm. Works on Ginju farm to support family and establish themselves as welcome residents.

npcs.name: Spearhead Unumanuk
npcs.bio: Watch Captain. Son of Teacup. Father of Oddclaw.

npcs.name: Oddclaw Unumanuk
npcs.bio: Only Watch member. Thinks his name means more than being a fighter. Loves animals and wants to train them to protect town; father thinks that is stupid and dangerous. Found claw came from invasive Nazgraku, escaped mounts of the thwarted Cleaver’s Edge horde.

npcs.name: Tooth Hatayap
npcs.bio: Waitress. Binding’s husband’s sister’s daughter; Spearhead’s sister’s husband’s sister’s daughter; Oddclaw’s aunt’s husband’s sister’s daughter. Once held Tuhupnuk surname before Hammerhead murdered Sand and was banished.

npcs.name: Hammerhead Tuhupnuk
npcs.bio: Bonehewer who murdered his brother Sand and was banished.

npcs.name: Talisman Hatayap
npcs.bio: Binding’s husband. Village snow-watcher who sacrificed himself to distract the wyrm.

npcs.name: Bowstring Hatayap
npcs.bio: A bowyer who helped her brother distract the Wyrm using one of her bows in her last moments.
